summary: All 16 phases have buildable scope implemented and verified locally (Pint, Larastan L6, tsc, Pest 44+ all green). Remaining work is credential-gated live integrations (BLOCKERS.md) and deferred polish (PUNCHLIST.md). Every navigable surface is real, tenant-scoped, and data-driven.

phases.name: Foundation & SiteGround pipeline
phases.note: All plumbing done; live SiteGround deploy + Pusher/S3 round-trips are credential-gated (BLK-1..3).

phases.name: Identity, auth & onboarding
phases.note: Register/login/forgot/reset, onboarding wizard, RBAC gates. 2FA/lockout deferred (PUNCHLIST).

phases.name: App shell & design system
phases.note: Design tokens, component library, universal patterns, shell + cmdK, offline banner.

phases.name: Channel gateway & WhatsApp/Messenger/Instagram
phases.note: Connectors for WhatsApp + Messenger + Instagram (Graph API, stub mode), shared MetaWebhookController with X-Hub-Signature-256 verification + idempotent dedupe, queued jobs. Live sends need page/WABA creds (BLK-4). Telegram/Line/Viber connectors still to add.

phases.name: Unified inbox & composer
phases.note: 3-pane inbox, composer state machine, realtime subscription (degrades w/o broker), offline queue.

phases.name: Contacts, CRM, hours & routing
phases.note: Contact CRM + profile, tags/quick replies, business hours, CSV import, load-balanced auto-routing (inbound new conversations). Skills-based routing deferred.

phases.name: eCommerce & conversational commerce
phases.note: Orders + catalog UI, store connection model. Live store sync + chat-to-order writeback need a dev store (BLK-5).

phases.name: Chatbot / flow builder
phases.note: Visual builder + FlowValidator (C-10) + atomic publish gate + FlowRuntime executor with max-step guard. NLP/LLM hooks deferred (BLK).

phases.name: Broadcasts, templates & wallet pre-flight
phases.note: Composer pre-flight + template manager + real send engine with atomic wallet debit and mid-send pause (C-03). Meta throughput throttle deferred.

phases.name: Automation & lifecycle triggers
phases.note: Rule UI + AutomationDispatcher (conditions, quiet hours, frequency cap, wallet skip+log+notify). Event-source wiring deferred.

phases.name: Billing, subscription & wallet ledger
phases.note: Plan cards, wallet + ledger UI, subscription model. Payment processor needed (BLK-6).

phases.name: Analytics, reporting & CSAT
phases.note: Dashboard with KPIs/charts/leaderboard. Queued aggregation pipeline deferred.

phases.name: Developer platform
phases.note: Sanctum REST API (contacts/conversations), resources, per-workspace rate limit, signed-webhook UI.

phases.name: Entry points
phases.note: Web widget config + live preview + install snippet; QR/link generator with attribution.

phases.name: Settings, i18n/RTL, notifications, mobile
phases.note: All 9 settings pages; i18n EN/AR/ES/PT + RTL + locale switch; notification prefs UI. Native/PWA mobile deferred.

phases.name: Hardening sweep
phases.note: RBAC, validation, idempotent webhooks, rate limits, tenant isolation tests in place; COMPLIANCE.md tracks Part C/D.

phases.name: Production deployment
phases.note: Runbook (DEPLOYMENT.md) + CI ready; needs SiteGround + service credentials (BLK-1..3).
